batch_metadata.note: Phase B. Jun-Jul 2025. Three-block data structure. Next batch (B-027) contains the Aug 2025 hot period anchor events.

arc_state_snapshot.note: ARC-RF07-001 ACTIVE. No new signals this batch. Jun-Jul 2025 inter-hot-period. Next batch (B-027) is the Aug 2025 hot period batch containing the second mega-cluster (S-004) and read-receipt pressure (S-005).

batch_observations.tone_assessment: Elevated Phase B — Jun-Jul 2025 post-hot-period. RF-04 and RF-05 signals continue. Communication pattern elevated from Phase A baseline but no RF-07 primary threshold events this batch.
batch_observations.rf07_assessment: Zero RF-07 primary signals. Jun-Jul 2025 is inter-hot-period (between May 2025 and Aug 2025 hot periods). Jul 19 full-custody threat cluster (B-027 pre-cursor) does not begin until next batch. Arc active at 3 signals.
batch_observations.custodial_context: Jun-Jul 2025 parenting-time weekends. No custodial-time-overstepping cluster at ADD-004 threshold confirmed this batch.
